name: Finnish Summer Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and halve the potatoes.
2. Cut 6 green onions (including tops) into 3-inch lengths.
3. Bring water to a boil in a wide 5-quart pan. Add potatoes and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Add salt, pepper, butter, onions, carrots, and green beans. Simmer for another 8 minutes.
5. Stir in peas and cook until vegetables are crisp-tender, about 2 more minutes.
6. In a small bowl, mix half and half with flour until smooth. Stir into the simmering soup.
7. Cook, stirring until slightly thickened (about 5 minutes).
Serving size: 1-2/3 cup
Per serving: 9 grams protein, 34 grams carbohydrates, 49 milligrams cholesterol, 292 calories
May be served with open faced sandwiches of cream cheese on rye, decorated with sliced vegetables.
